name: Marketing OKR Template
description: Marketing OKR Template - Marketing template for strategy professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS TEMPLATE Step 1: Define Annual Objectives Start with the Annual OKR Planner. Define 3-5 high-level marketing objectives for the year. Good objectives are ambitious, qualitative, and inspiring — they describe WHAT you want to achieve, not HOW. Step 2: Set Key Results For each objective, define 2-5 key results. Key results must be specific, measurable, and time-bound. They answer: How will we know we achieved this objective?
